subject: DIRECTIVE: upgrade all agents to A2A 1.0.0 + BEARER + ZMQ

body.directive: All 5 mesh agents must reach parity on security posture before v1 tag. The Tactical station currently shows uneven compliance. Every autonomous agent needs A2A 1.0.0 + bearer auth + ZMQ pub declared.
required_per_agent: Add security_schemes block with bearer auth
Declare zmq_pub in mesh.transport block (even if null with note for agents not yet on ZMQ)
Migrate extension URIs to github.com/safety-quotient-lab/a2a-* pattern
body.context: The Tactical bridge station (LCARS dashboard) shows shield status per agent. Uneven compliance looks bad on the v1 dashboard and represents a real security gap. SEC-1 (psq + observatory no auth) and SEC-6 (ZMQ not declared) from the original security audit remain open for 3 agents.
body.psychology_agent_offers: Use psychology-agent's .well-known/agent-card.json as the template — it already passes all checks. Operations-agent can propagate the template to psq, unratified, and observatory repos.

claims.text: Only 2 of 5 agents (psychology + operations) currently have A2A 1.0.0 agent cards with bearer auth.
claims.confidence_basis: Direct observation of agent cards via cross-repo fetch and dashboard Tactical station display.

action_gate.gate_condition: All 5 agents at A2A 1.0.0 + BEARER + ZMQ

epistemic_flags: ZMQ declaration may be 'null with note' for agents where ZMQ pub is not yet configured — the declaration signals intent, not implementation
Bearer auth declared in agent card does not mean the endpoint enforces it — CF Access (PR #33) provides the actual enforcement
